Constant
6 C 6 1111111111 a mismatch

6 I 7 0101000101 4 mismatch

6 I 0n 0000101100 3 mismatch

6 AND 70 0101000001 3 mismatch

6 XOR 70 1010010110 5 match 1/1

6 1010010110 5
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 0101000101 partial 1111010011 7
left 7
Starting at I 1 decreasing

right 4

6 I 7

Selected
0 I 1
1 I 2

5 I 6
6 XOR 70
7 I 1

Applying to 01100101
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 1 = 1
1 I 2 = 1
2 I 3 = 0
3 I 4 = 0
4 I 5 = 1
5 I 6 = 0
6 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(1,0) = 1
7 I 1 = 1

\boxed{11001011}
